positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a mountain range at sunrise, viewed from a serene meadow. The style should be sophisticated modern vector art with clean lines and flat areas of color, reminiscent of Scandinavian folk art meets graphic poster design. The foreground features silhouetted stylized pine trees and a meandering river. The sky transitions from deep indigo at the zenith to brilliant gold and coral hues near the horizon. Focus on dramatic contrast between the dark, crisp foreground silhouettes and the luminous, gradient background. The composition must be perfectly centered, with the mountain peak forming a strong, stable central focal point. Optimized for apparel printing on a light-colored fabric.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, grainy, artifact, noise, text, watermark, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, messy lines, gradient fade
